title: Frigid Original Soundtracks
description: A mod that contains original soundtracks for the modpack, Frigid
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)

![frigidosts title](https://i.postimg.cc/fy6qPXzk/frigidosts.png)

**Frigid Original Soundtracks** is a mod that replaces all Vanilla Overworld music with original soundtracks for the modpack, Frigid for Forge 1.20.1.

## Features

- 6 original soundtracks (1 main menu track, 5 ambient tracks)
- All ambient tracks play and replace all vanilla Overworld OSTs.
- Main menu track plays and replace all vanilla main menu OSTs.
- Splash text crediting X_a_n_d_e_r, the composer of all Frigid OSTs.

## Usage & License

- All music are owned and licnesed All Rights Reserved by MarbledHubb Studios.
- All music is composed by X_a_n_d_e_r, composer at MarbledHubb Studios.
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE.
